wine_tours.name: Cinc Pioners Founding Estate Tour
tour_types: Full-day guided visit to the five 1989 founding estates
Clos Mogador and Alvaro Palacios combined morning
Clos de l'Obac and Clos Martinet afternoon
Private Cinc Pioners narrative tour
wine_tours.price_range: From EUR 120-200 per person; private versions on request
wine_tours.description: The Priorat revival pilgrimage: guided visits to Clos Mogador, Alvaro Palacios, Clos Erasmus, Clos Martinet and Clos de l'Obac, the five estates that launched the 1989 renaissance.

wine_tours.name: Cartoixa d'Escaladei Historical Wine Tour
wine_tours.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
tour_types: Guided tour of the 12th-century Carthusian monastery ruins
Monastery vineyard and Priorat wine-history walk
Scala Dei winery visit combined with Cartoixa ruins

wine_tours.description: Visit the 12th-century Carthusian monastery where Priorat viticulture originated; guided walks through the ruins and adjacent Scala Dei winery.

wine_tours.name: Llicorella Slate Terrace Hike (Bellmunt-Porrera)

wine_tours.neighborhood: Bellmunt del Priorat and Porrera, DOQ Priorat
tour_types: Self-guided llicorella geology walk with DOQ map
Guided half-day old-vine terrace hike
Full-day Bellmunt-to-Porrera ridge walk with cellar stops
wine_tours.price_range: Self-guided free with DOQ map; guided from EUR 45
wine_tours.description: Walk the black slate llicorella terraces between the old lead-mining village of Bellmunt and Porrera; a guided terroir hike through DOQ Priorat slopes.

wine_tours.name: Falset Wine Route Day Tour

Guided minibus day tour from Falset hub
Morning cooperative and afternoon estate combo
wine_tours.price_range: Self-drive free; guided from EUR 75-130 per person
wine_tours.description: The official Falset-based wine route linking the cooperative, historic estates and village cellars across the DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant zones.

wine_tours.name: Cooperativa Falset Marca Guided Tour
wine_tours.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
tour_types: Guided architectural and winemaking tour of the 1919 Martinell building
Etim range tasting after the tour
Group school and trade visit programmes
wine_tours.price_range: From EUR 8-15 per person including tasting
wine_tours.description: Guided tour of the 1919 Cesar Martinell-designed cooperative; the tour covers winemaking history and ends with an Etim tasting in the wine-cathedral building.

wine_tours.name: Old-Vine Pruning and Viticulture Workshop

tour_types: Hands-on winter pruning workshop on llicorella terraces
Old-vine Carinena training demonstration
Garnacha parcel work with harvest participation in September
wine_tours.description: Hands-on viticulture workshops on the llicorella terraces: winter pruning sessions and September harvest participation with Priorat producers.

wine_tours.name: L'Ermita Single-Vineyard Panorama Walk
wine_tours.address: Carretera de Gratallops a la Vilella Baixa s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tour_types: Guided walk to the L'Ermita chapel viewpoint over the Manyetes amphitheatre
High-altitude Garnacha parcel education with view tasting
Hermitage chapel and llicorella boulder walk
wine_tours.price_range: From EUR 90 per person; private rates on request
wine_tours.description: Guided walk to the L'Ermita chapel above Gratallops, the source of Alvaro Palacios's most expressive Garnacha parcel; an elevation-and-geology lecture with a view.

Single-estate harvest day (pick, sort, press)
Harvest lunch with winemaker tasting

wine_tours.description: September harvest experiences across Priorat: single-day grape picking with lunch and tasting, or week-long multi-estate immersions coordinated through the denomination.
